overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town during golden hour. The character traverses cobblestone streets, passes timber-framed buildings, explores a bustling waterfront market, and walks along the docks with tall sailing ships visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street approaching harbor fortifications

events.description: passes close to a wooden lantern post on the right side of the street
approaching the stone harbor wall and wooden fortification walkway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the cobblestone streets toward the harbor wall, passing timber warehouses and guards

notable_agents.action: two guards in red uniforms walking patrol along the street

entered.detail: large wooden warehouse with vertical planks and heavy timber doors
tall stone fortification wall with weathered gray blocks
elevated wooden defensive walkway with crenellations on top of the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval town street paved with cobblestones, passing a large timber warehouse on the right. The stone harbor wall looms ahead with an elevated wooden walkway, while guards in red uniforms patrol the area. The warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor waterfront with wooden docks and sailing vessels

events.description: emerges from enclosed street to open waterfront, revealing the harbor and large sailing ships
turns away from the waterfront to head back into the town streets

agents.ego_description: Geralt reaches the waterfront, pauses to view the large sailing ship in the harbor, then turns to return to the town streets

entered.detail: tall masted vessel with furled sails and red flags docked in the harbor
weathered wooden piers and mooring posts along the water's edge
calm harbor water reflecting the golden sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to the harbor waterfront where a large sailing ship is moored against the wooden docks. Geralt walks along the dirt path by the water, views the ship, then turns back toward the town. The sky is fully visible over the water, backlit by the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with market stalls and timber-framed taverns

events.description: crowd density increases as entering the market square with more NPCs visible
entering the covered market area with green canvas stalls and merchants

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the bustling town square, passing villagers seated on benches and approaching the market stalls

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting on a wooden bench conversing near a tree
merchant standing near a wooden cart loaded with goods

entered.detail: market stall with green canvas tarp covering a wooden frame structure
two-story timber-framed building with dark wood diamond pattern walls
wooden wagon with canvas cover parked on the cobblestones

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through the town center square paved with cobblestones, passing a timber tavern and villagers resting on benches. The crowd density increases as he approaches the market area with green canvas stalls. A wooden cart sits parked near the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded harbor market walkway with merchant stalls and docked ships

events.description: entering the densest part of the market with many NPCs browsing and walking
passes close to a fish merchant stall with hanging dried fish on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigates through the crowded dockside market, passing fish merchants and shoppers near the moored vessels

notable_agents.action: fish merchant standing behind a stall with hanging dried fish and goods
woman in a dress walking through the crowd toward the camera

entered.detail: wooden stall with hanging dried fish and goods displayed on rough tables
large coils of hemp rope stacked on the dockside near the walkway
tall stone warehouse with arched doorways facing the harbor

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the narrow wooden dockside walkway through a dense crowd of merchants and shoppers. Fish merchant stalls line the left side with goods hanging from the frames, while rope coils sit stacked on the right. The tall masts of docked ships rise in the background, and the lighting mixes natural sunset with warm artificial light from braziers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval harbor town that transitions from quiet cobblestone streets to a bustling, crowded waterfront market. It begins with Geralt walking past a large timber warehouse under the long shadows of golden hour, moving toward a stone harbor wall patrolled by guards in red uniforms. As the path opens to the waterfront, the camera follows him along a dirt trail beside a moored sailing ship backlit by the setting sun before turning back toward the town center. The scene then shifts into a paved square filled with villagers and timber taverns, gradually increasing in density as the camera approaches a market area with green canvas stalls and parked wooden carts. Finally, the movement leads onto a narrow wooden dockside walkway, weaving through a dense crowd of merchants and fish stalls while the natural sunset blends with the warm glow of artificial braziers beneath the towering masts of docked ships.
